Class DRDesignMeterPlot

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.chart.plot.AbstractDesignBasePlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.chart.plot.DRDesignAxisPlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.chart.plot.DRDesignMeterPlot
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignAxisPlot, DRIDesignBasePlot, DRIDesignMeterPlot, DRIDesignPlot, Serializable
public class DRDesignMeterPlot extends DRDesignAxisPlot implements DRIDesignMeterPlot

DRDesignMeterPlot class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
